% ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% This file was generated with the assistance of AI (Claude, Anthropic).
% ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

% ══ build/preamble.tex ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
% Custom LaTeX preamble for De Mensura Hominis.
% Loaded via include-in-header in _quarto.yml.
% Only contains settings that Quarto does not manage itself.
%
% OPTIONAL font matching (see SETUP.md):
% To match the HTML output fonts (Jost body, Outfit headings, JetBrains Mono
% code), install those fonts as system fonts and uncomment the Optional block
% below, commenting out the Default block.
% ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

% ── Fonts (XeLaTeX) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

% Default: classic book fonts, no extra installation required.
%\usepackage{fontspec}
%\setmainfont{TeX Gyre Pagella}
%\setmonofont[Scale=0.88]{Inconsolata}

% Optional: uncomment to match HTML fonts exactly.
% Requires Outfit, Jost, and JetBrains Mono installed as system fonts.
% See SETUP.md — "Optional: match PDF fonts to HTML".
%
\usepackage{fontspec}
\setmainfont{Jost}
\setsansfont{Outfit}
\setmonofont[Scale=0.88]{JetBrains Mono}

% ── Palette colours for PDF ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Defined here so they can be reused in any future custom LaTeX elements.
% Quarto handles hyperref colours via _quarto.yml (NavyBlue / RoyalBlue).
\usepackage{xcolor}
\definecolor{bookbrown}{HTML}{722818}
\definecolor{bookamber}{HTML}{ED952F}
\definecolor{bookcream}{HTML}{DECDAB}
\definecolor{bookblue}{HTML}{4A90A8}
\definecolor{bookpage}{HTML}{EAE4D4}

% Set page background color
\pagecolor{bookpage}

% Nudge line numbers inward
\AtBeginDocument{
  \RecustomVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{
    commandchars=\\\{\},
    numbers=left,
    numbersep=8pt
  }
}

% ── Microtype ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{microtype}

% ── Widows and orphans ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\widowpenalty=10000
\clubpenalty=10000

% ── Section number colour ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
% Colours the chapter/section numbers amber to match the HTML output.
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\usepackage{titlesec}

\titleformat{\chapter}[display]
  {\normalfont\huge\bfseries\color{bookbrown}}
  {\color{bookamber}\chaptertitlename\ \thechapter}
  {20pt}
  {\Huge\color{bookbrown}}
  [\vspace{2pt}{\color{bookbrown}\titlerule[1pt]}]

\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\Large\bfseries\color{bookbrown}}
  {\color{bookamber}\thesection}
  {0.8em}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\large\bfseries\color{bookbrown}}
  {\color{bookamber}\thesubsection}
  {0.8em}
  {}

% ── Running headers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
\usepackage{scrlayer-scrpage}
\pagestyle{scrheadings}
\automark[section]{chapter}
\setkomafont{pageheadfoot}{\small\color{bookbrown}}
\setkomafont{pagenumber}{\small\color{bookbrown}}
